name: ELE BLAZE
short_description: Fighting, dodge bullets and traps, ELE BLAZE is transverse scrolling game of ACT, The girl - Nono have powerful ELE energy battling with enemies and stop chaos spreads, save the universe.
detailed_description:
Fighting, dodge bullets and traps, ELE BLAZE is transverse scrolling game of ACT, The girl - Nono have powerful ELE energy battling with enemies and stop chaos spreads, save the universe.

features

adorable animations of charater

Melee combo, agile bullets, and Healing skill to fight with enemyies

powerful rush skill dodge attacks and traps from enemy

The strong BOSS in deep stage waitting for battle with you

convenient select stage to beginning your game

default keyboard setting:

Jump W

Crouch S

Jump - W

Crouch - S

Left - A

Right - D

Fight - J

shot - K

Rush - L

heal - I

Press F1 reset button to default on setting stage
